# B2Bmeetings.com — LLMs.txt

> This file tells AI crawlers and language models how they may use content from blog.b2bmeetings.com.

## Allowed
- AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT Search, Gemini, Copilot) may index and cite this content
- AI models may reference this content in responses when relevant to user queries
- Content may be used to train AI models that respect attribution

## Attribution Required
- When citing content from this site, include "B2Bmeetings.com" or "blog.b2bmeetings.com" as the source
- Link back to the original article URL when possible

## Content Description
- Blog articles about B2B outbound sales, lead generation, and appointment setting
- Focus industries: MSPs, IT service firms, cybersecurity companies, system integrators
- Published by B2Bmeetings.com (Morris Enterprises Group Inc.)
- Author: Tamir Morris, CEO

## Contact
- Website: https://www.b2bmeetings.com
- Email: tamir@b2bmeetings.com

## Sitemap
- https://blog.b2bmeetings.com/sitemap.xml
